features.name: struct packed type in port declaration
features.description: Code should include a port declaration using a struct packed type with multiple logic fields
features.snippet: input struct packed {logic clock; logic reset; } port_name

features.name: nested struct packed type in port declaration
features.description: Code should include a port declaration using a nested struct packed type (struct containing struct packed)
features.snippet: input struct packed {struct packed {logic clock; logic reset; } member; } port_name

features.name: wire assignment with struct packed type and struct expression
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with struct packed type assigned via a struct expression
features.snippet: wire struct packed {logic clock; logic reset; } _GEN = '{clock: expr, reset: expr};

features.name: deeply nested struct packed in wire assignment
features.description: Code should include a wire assignment with deeply nested struct packed types (3+ levels) using struct expressions
features.snippet: wire struct packed {struct packed {struct packed {logic clock; logic reset; } inner; } outer; } _GEN = '{outer: '{inner: '{clock: c, reset: r}}};
